Murf AI

AI voiceover generator with 120+ realistic voices across 20+ languages.

Category Audio
Pricing $23/mo Creator
Released October 2020
Affiliate 20% recurring (24 months)
Visit Murf AI →

About Murf AI

Murf generates realistic AI voiceovers for videos, podcasts, and presentations. 120+ voices across accents and styles with 24-month recurring affiliate commissions. Voice cloning creates a consistent brand voice. No microphone or recording equipment needed. No significant news found for March 2026.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Voices sound genuinely human
  • 120+ voices and styles
  • 20% recurring affiliate (24 months)
  • Voice cloning available

❌ Cons

  • Free trial very limited
  • Some voices still artificial
  • Technical term pronunciation issues

Best For

Creators who need voiceovers but hate recording themselves.

audiovoiceoverpodcastingvideo
